commit.message:
revert: remove ResPlan floorplan recommendation feature

Reverts commits 396bf0a, a5d4140, 8f2d473 — removing the Plan Library
panel, preprocessing script, 50 plan JSONs, thumbnails, and all
associated TypeScript types/store/hook/components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(floorplan-2d): move useMemo before early return in ResplanPanel

useMemo was placed after the conditional `return null`, causing React
error #300 (rendered more hooks than previous render). All hooks must
be called unconditionally before any early returns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(floorplan-2d): fix infinite re-render loop in ResplanPanel

getFilteredPlans selector returned new [] on every call when index
was null, causing Zustand's Object.is check to trigger re-renders
indefinitely. Fix by using a stable empty array constant and moving
filtering into useMemo inside the component.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(floorplan-2d): add ResPlan floorplan recommendation panel with 50 plans

Introduce a Plan Library sidebar in the 2D editor that lets users browse
and insert pre-processed residential floorplans from the ResPlan dataset.
Clicking a plan inserts walls, openings, and room zones into the canvas
using the existing mergeSubgraph/addZones infrastructure.

- Python preprocessing script converts ResPlan pickle → WallGraph JSON
- 50 plans with SVG thumbnails and metadata index
- Zustand store, insertion hook, panel + thumbnail components
- Bedroom count filter (All / 1BR / 2BR / 3BR / 4+)
- Toolbar button to toggle Plan Library panel

Add README.md

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

feat: sharp Claude Decisions redesign — max visibility, no scrolling

- All text white (removed all grey-fg)

commit.message:
perf: skip redundant Secret Manager writes with token hash check

Add _last_saved_token_hash to track per-user token state and skip
_save_token_to_secret when access_token, refresh_token, and expires_at
haven't changed. Eliminates ~0.5s overhead per sap_query call when
the token was not refreshed during the query.

Also add Cloud Trace IAM permission guidance comment to deploy script
for enable_tracing=True.

commit.message:
Filter search to libgen-only sources so all results have download links

Without the filter, zlib/upload/etc results appear first and have no
libgen.li download URL, causing silent failures. Re-adding src=anti__X
params fixes books like "Scaling People" that were returning NO LINK.

commit.message:
fix(security): resolve 10 production audit findings

Critical:
- timing-safe comparison: replaced === with crypto.timingSafeEqual()
  in MetricsKeyGuard and AgentApiKeyGuard (prevents timing attacks)

Access control — added @Roles() to 5 unprotected controllers:
- cash-finance: owner, admin, manager
- trip-analytics: owner, admin, manager (+ PeriodQueryDto validation)
- vhm24-integration: owner, admin, manager
- investor dividends: owner, admin (+ organizationId tenant filter)
- metrics: owner, admin

Multi-tenant:
- promo-codes: duplicate check now scoped to organizationId (was global)
- investor findDividends: added organizationId filter

Data integrity:
- collections: replaced hard delete (.remove) with .softDelete()

Performance:
- Added @Index on organizationId: investor-profile, dividend-payment
- Added @Index on investorProfileId: dividend-payment
- Added @Index on organizationId: payment-refund

Infrastructure:
- Removed DB_USER/DB_PASSWORD from Grafana container environment
- Reverted ajv override (breaks ESLint 9.x internal ajv dependency)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Strip email quotes (>) in elider (#53)

* Add better functional tests for textproc/chain

Adds two new functional test cases to cover gaps in testing:

1. realistic_email: Tests elidable content handling
   - Verifies URLs are reduced to domain names only
   - Tests block quoted content elision
   - Tests signature elision after -- delimiter
   - Inline quoted text preserved (will be removed in future PR)

2. large_email_body: Tests multiple ChunkSlices with overlap
   - 134 paragraphs (~23K characters) to trigger 7 ChunkSlices
   - Verifies exactly 2 overlapping chunks between adjacent ChunkSlices
   - Validates proper chunk boundary handling

Also updates simple_text to use actual tab characters instead of spaces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Strip email quotes (>) in elider

Add support for eliding lines starting with > which is a standard
convention for denoting quoted text in email replies.

- Add logic in processNormal() to detect and skip >-prefixed lines
- Add tests for single and multiple quoted lines, mixed content,
  and trailing whitespace handling
- Update realistic_email expected output to reflect elided quotes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove isomorphic-dompurify/jsdom to fix Vercel serverless crash

isomorphic-dompurify depends on jsdom (~20MB) which crashes in Vercel's
serverless bundling. Since sanitizeHtml() strips ALL tags (ALLOWED_TAGS=[]),
a regex-based approach is sufficient — the text goes to AI APIs, not browsers.

This was the root cause of 500 HTML errors on every AI endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Summarize 11-PR batch — position specs, quality reviews, skill updates (#816)

* feat: BackwardBitReader.init specs — totalBitsRemaining bound and startPos (#804)

Add the first specifications for BackwardBitReader.init:
- BackwardBitReader_init_totalBitsRemaining_lt: the initial bit count
  is strictly less than 8 * (endPos - startPos), since the sentinel
  bit is consumed during initialization
- BackwardBitReader_init_startPos_eq: init preserves the startPos argument

These complete the reader lifecycle specs (init → readBits → isFinished),
enabling downstream proofs to track bit budgets through the full pipeline.

Also makes highBitPos non-private (was private) so the sentinel position
bound (< 8) can be proved in the spec file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: progress entry for BackwardBitReader.init specs session

Document the common pitfall where `repeat split at h` fails to walk
through chained if-then-else branches. Add flat split pattern as fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: kit PAD PLAY mode with touch velocity

Adds PAD PLAY toggle button in kit mode header (next to BACK).
When active:
- Single pointerdown on a pad immediately triggers sound (no two-tap dance)
- Velocity from pointer event: uses ev.pressure if device supports it
  (3D Touch / S-Pen), otherwise uses contact area (ev.width × ev.height)
  as a proxy — harder press = larger contact area = higher velocity
- Brief green flash on triggered pad for visual feedback
- Click events suppressed in play mode so normal editing is unaffected

sampler.trigger(slotIndex, velocity=1) and _startVoice now accept velocity,
applied as pad.volume * velocity at note-on time.

SW bumped to v156.

fix(geocoding): revert OSM query to street+postalCode only

Adding city/settlement to the free-form OSM query confused Nominatim
(e.g. "Σαμοθράκης 16 56334 Ελευθέριο Κορδελιό" returned no results).

Reverted to proven format: "Σαμοθράκης 16 56334" — postal code alone
provides sufficient disambiguation. City is used in structured search
variants (2-5) where it's a separate parameter.

fix: UIバグ修正 (WYSIWYG見出し・overflow・レガシータブCSS)

- .accordion-content overflow: hidden → visible (Bug #4: 同上)
- レガシー .sidebar-tabs/.sidebar-tab CSS削除 (Bug #5: アコーディオン移行済み)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: integrate Claude Agent SDK capabilities — model/command discovery, effort/thinking, MCP runtime, file rewind, structured output

Systematically integrate high-value SDK capabilities while preserving the
multi-provider architecture:

SDK capability discovery (per-provider cache):
- agent-sdk-capabilities.ts: cache models, commands, account info, MCP status
  per provider via Map<providerId, cache> to prevent cross-provider pollution
- claude-client.ts: fire-and-forget captureCapabilities() after query() init
- providers/models: merge SDK models with static defaults
- skills: merge SDK slash commands with filesystem skills

Query options passthrough:
- thinking (adaptive/enabled/disabled), effort (low/medium/high/max),
  outputFormat, agents, enableFileCheckpointing
- /chat page.tsx: first-message path now includes effort/thinking (was missing)
- stream-session-manager: passes effort/thinking in POST body

Graceful interrupt:
- /api/chat/interrupt: conversation.interrupt() before abort fallback
- stream-session-manager: tries interrupt first, aborts after 2s timeout

MCP runtime management:
- /api/plugins/mcp/status: live status from active Query, auto-resolves
  providerId from session DB record (prevents wrong-provider cache writes)
- /api/plugins/mcp/reconnect + toggle: reconnect/enable/disable servers
- McpManager + McpServerList: runtime status indicators with action buttons

File checkpointing & rewind:
- enableFileCheckpointing=true for code mode by default
- rewind_point SSE: only emitted for prompt-level user messages
  (parent_tool_use_id===null) and skips autoTrigger turns
- /api/chat/rewind: dry-run preview + actual rewind via rewindFiles()
- MessageList: RewindButton with dry-run preview

Structured output:
- /api/chat/structured: reads SDKResultSuccess.structured_output as primary
  path, text fallback only when absent

Account info & thinking config:
- /api/sdk/account: cached account info display
- Settings: thinking_mode in ALLOWED_KEYS, thinking mode selector in UI
- Effort selector in MessageInput with lifted state pattern

New files: 11 route handlers + 2 lib modules + 1 test file
Modified files: 18 (types, client, manager, UI components, i18n)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: install rust to SETUP_HOME and source cargo env at init

Three issues with the rust op under sudo:
- rustup installer used $HOME (=/root), installing to /root/.cargo
  instead of SETUP_HOME; fix by passing HOME=SETUP_HOME to curl|sh
  and to all cargo invocations
- .cargo/env was never sourced in setup_init_env, so cargo was absent
  from PATH when the rust op was skipped (unlike nvm which is sourced);
  add it alongside the nvm source
- verify_rust used command -v which depends on PATH; switch to checking
  binary file presence so it works regardless of current PATH
